Class Megafauna

java.lang.Object
Megafauna
public class Megafauna extends Object
This is main controller class for the Megafauna Safari Simulation. It serves as main client class and controls the flow of program.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Megafauna()
    Default constructor initialises default objects and empty lists.

    Description

    Displays the report at the end of every visit.

    Method to display a formatted table showing each suitable location with animal count.

    Displays the welcome message.
    void
    endTour()
    Displays the reason of tour ended as per tour simulation status.

    getSuitableLocations()
    Returns all locations that are both suitable for the selected tour and have not yet been visited.

    Method to handle one predator's attack on the first tourist in the group.

    Loads locations and animals from sighting.txt via FileIO.

  • Constructor Details

    • Megafauna

      public Megafauna()
      Default constructor initialises default objects and empty lists.

  • Method Details

    • displayEndOfVisit

      public void displayEndOfVisit(Location location, int attackedCount, int minorBefore, int majorBefore, int deathsBefore)
      Displays the report at the end of every visit.
      Parameters:
      location - the location that was just visited
      attackedCount - total tourists attacked this visit
      minorBefore - minor injury count before this visit
      majorBefore - major injury count before this visit
      deathsBefore - death count before this visit

    • displayLocations

      public void displayLocations(ArrayList<Location> locations)
      Method to display a formatted table showing each suitable location with animal count.
      Parameters:
      locations - the list of suitable locations to display

    • displayWelcome

      public void displayWelcome()
      Displays the welcome message.

    • endTour

      public void endTour()
      Displays the reason of tour ended as per tour simulation status.

    • getSuitableLocations

      public ArrayList<Location> getSuitableLocations()
      Returns all locations that are both suitable for the selected tour and have not yet been visited.
      Returns:
      ArrayList of eligible Location objects

    • handleAttack

      public void handleAttack(Animal animal)
      Method to handle one predator's attack on the first tourist in the group.
      Parameters:
      animal - the predator that attacked

    • loadData

      public void loadData() throws IOException
      Loads locations and animals from sighting.txt via FileIO.
      Throws:
      IOException - if the file cannot be read

    • main

      public static void main(String[] args)
      Main method creates a Megafauna object and starts the simulation.
      Parameters:
      args - An array of Strings representing command line arguments.

    • setupTour

      public void setupTour()
      Displays tour options, reads the guide's choice and initialises TourSummary.

    • setupTourists

      public void setupTourists()
      Method to prompt the number of tourists for safari.

    • simulate

      public void simulate()
      Method to run the full simulation i.e. load data, welcome message, setup tour and summary.

    • startTour

      public void startTour()
      Tour simulation loop.

    • visitLocation

      public void visitLocation(Location location)
      Simulates visiting one location and tracking TourSummary.
      Parameters:
      location - the Location to visit
